violations.text: Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Self-serve candy does not have an allergy disclosure sign/label. Establishment must disclose allergens in product. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

At the time of inspection, the wall of candies, meant for customer self-selection, was observed to be lacking food label information for items. Per the PIC, food label information for ingredients/allergens is to be maintained in abinder/notebook for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
